data.body: LEARNING: standalone 'rebar verify-completion' read a STALE tree (verified_at_sha 9edb0cdc, lacks opcert work) — NOT a valid pre-check. The CLOSE path (rebar transition closed) reads local HEAD correctly (proven: earlier close found real impl + 2 precise gaps, now fixed in PS9). Will close 4214 via transition after CI Verified+1 on PS9. Re-polling #664 PS9 + #685 PS2.
